person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoiries de la famille de Montmorency Laval :
De Montmorency, la croix chargée de cinq coquilles d'argent.
Devise :
DIEU AIDE AU PREMIER BARON CHRÉTIEN
Guy VIII de Laval, fils de Guy VII de Laval ( - 1267), chevalier, seigneur de Laval et de Philippa de Vitré ( - 1254), baronne de Vitré ;
Marié en premières noces en 1260, avec Isabeau de Beaumont-du-Gâtinais, dame de Bréviaire, dont
1) Guy ( - 1333) ;
Marié en secondes noces le 11 novembre 1286, avec Jeanne de Brienne ( - 1323), dame de Loué, dont
 2) André
 3) Philippa
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency於1245年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY26歲，母親Philippa de Vitré36歲。他於1260年與Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1265年登記服兵役。他去世於1295年8月22日在法國波特-哈倫斯維安利斯萊-喬爾達享年50歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency于1245年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾时，他的父亲Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY26岁，母亲Philippa de Vitré36岁。他于1260年与Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1265年登记服兵役。他去世于1295年8月22日在法国波特-哈倫斯維安利斯萊-喬爾達享年50岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency was born in 1245, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY, was 26 and his mother, Philippa de Vitré, was 36. He married Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais in 1260. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1265. He died on 22 August 1295, in L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 50, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency est né en 1245, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Vitré, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais en 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1265. Il est décédé le 22 août 1295, à L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency 1245 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY 26 und seine Mutter Philippa de Vitré 36. Er hat 1260 Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1265 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 22. August 1295 im Alter von 50 Jahren in L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais nel 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1265. Morì il 22 agosto 1295, nel L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorencyが1245年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルで生まれた時，父Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCYは26歳，母Philippa de Vitréは36歳であった。1260年にIsabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年に兵役登録をした。彼は1295年8月22日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンル'イスレ-ジョウルダインで50歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンオリベトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency(이)가 1245년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Vitré(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1260년 Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1295년 8월 22일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 '이슬레-조우르다인에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency nasceu em 1245, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Vitré, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais em 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1265. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1295, em L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency родился в 1245 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Vitré, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais в 1260 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1265 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 22 августа 1295 г. в местности л'исле-джоурдеин, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности оливет, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

Se casó con Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais en 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1265. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1295, en L'Isle-Jourdain, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
